title: Settings

search.searchSuggestions: Try searching for theme, notifications, or password

overview.metaDescription: 管理您的 Puzzled 帳戶設定
overview.title: 設定
overview.subtitle: 管理您的帳戶和偏好設定

playerCard.title: Player Card
playerCard.shareDescription: Share your player card with friends

achievements.title: Achievement Showcase
achievements.description: Select up to {max} achievements to display on your profile
achievements.helpText: Click achievements to add or remove from your showcase. These will be displayed on your player card.
achievements.savedDescription: Your achievement showcase has been updated
achievements.saveFailedDescription: Could not save your showcase. Please try again.

securityScore.title: Security Checkup
securityScore.description: Protect your account with these security measures

streakFreeze.title: Streak Freeze
streakFreeze.description: Protect your streak when you can't play
streakFreeze.autoFreezeDesc: Automatically use a freeze if you miss a day
streakFreeze.usageHistoryDesc: See when streak freezes were used
streakFreeze.purchaseDesc: Premium members get {count} freezes per month
streakFreeze.giftDesc: Send a streak freeze to a friend

referral.title: Invite Friends
referral.description: Share Puzzled and earn rewards together
referral.shareText: Join me on Puzzled! Daily brain games to challenge your mind 🧩
referral.rewardDescription: Earn a streak freeze for every 5 friends who join!

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your public profile and personal information
profile.avatarDescription: Upload a photo to personalize your profile

avatarUpload.allowedFormats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP. Max 5MB.
avatarUpload.dragDropHint: Drag and drop or click to upload.
avatarUpload.avatarUpdatedDescription: Your profile picture has been updated.
avatarUpload.avatarRemovedDescription: Your profile picture has been removed.
avatarUpload.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP image.
avatarUpload.fileTooLarge: File too large. Please upload an image smaller than 5MB.

profile.personalInfoDescription: Update your name, username, and bio
profile.displayNameHint: This is how your name appears to others
profile.usernameRules: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only. 3-20 characters.
profile.emailChangeNote: Go to Account settings to change your email
profile.bioHint: Optional. Shown on your public profile.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...
profile.publicProfileDescription: Make your profile visible at puzzled.gg/u/{username}
profile.setUsernameFirst: Set a username to enable public profile
profile.profileVisibleAt: Your profile will be visible at /u/{username}

account.title: Account
account.description: Manage your connected accounts and sign-in methods
account.connectedAccountsDescription: Link your social accounts for easier sign-in
account.cannotDisconnectLast: You cannot disconnect your only sign-in method
account.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect {provider}?

password.title: Password
password.description: Manage your password for email sign-in
password.setPasswordDescription: Add a password to sign in without social accounts
password.setPasswordSecurityNote: Your social account login verifies your identity. Setting a password adds an alternative way to sign in.
password.passwordInvalid: Password does not meet security requirements
password.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
password.noOAuthAccount: You must have a connected social account to set a password
password.alreadyHasPassword: You already have a password set. Use change password instead.
password.verifyIdentityDescription: For security, please verify your identity before changing your password.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected Accounts
connectedAccounts.cannotDisconnect: Cannot disconnect - this is your only sign-in method
connectedAccounts.connectError: Failed to connect {provider}. Please try again.
connectedAccounts.disconnectError: Failed to disconnect account. Please try again.
connectedAccounts.lastAccountWarning: This is your only sign-in method. Connect another account or set a password before disconnecting.
connectedAccounts.noPasswordWarning: Set a password first to disconnect this account. Without a password, you need at least two connected accounts.
connectedAccounts.helpText: Connect multiple accounts for backup sign-in options and enhanced security.
connectedAccounts.securityTip: We recommend connecting at least 2 accounts to prevent account lockout.
connectedAccounts.verifyIdentityDescription: For security, please verify your identity before modifying your connected accounts.

email.title: Email Address
email.changeEmailDescription: We'll send a verification link to your new email address. Click it to confirm the change.
email.confirmPasswordHelper: Enter your password to confirm this change
email.verificationSent: Verification email sent! Check your new email inbox.
email.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
email.passwordRequired: Password is required to change your email
email.pendingChangeDescription: A verification email has been sent to {email}
email.setPasswordDescription: You need to set a password before you can change your email address. Go to the Password section below to add one.
email.changeSuccessDescription: Your email has been updated to {email}
email.verifyToChangeEmail: For security, please verify your identity before changing your email address.

security.title: Security
security.twoFactorDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account
security.mfaEnabledDescription: Your account is protected with an authenticator app
security.mfaDisabledDescription: Enable 2FA to add an extra layer of security
security.verifyPasswordDescription: Please enter your password to enable two-factor authentication.
security.scanQrCodeDescription: Use your authenticator app (like Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password) to scan this QR code.
security.cantScanQr: Can't scan? Enter this code manually
security.enterVerificationCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
security.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication?
security.confirmDisableDescription: This will remove the extra layer of security from your account. You can re-enable it at any time.
security.saveBackupCodesNow: Save your recovery codes before continuing
security.backupCodesWarning: Save these codes in a secure location
security.backupCodesWarningDescription: These are your only way to access your account if you lose your authenticator device. Each code can only be used once.
security.passwordRequiredDescription: Two-factor authentication requires a password for verification. Please set up a password in your Account Settings first.
security.passwordRequiredFor2FA: A password is required to enable two-factor authentication

loginHistory.title: Login History
loginHistory.description: Recent sign-in activity on your account

securityCheckup.title: Security Checkup
securityCheckup.description: Quick overview of your account security

security.pageDescription: Manage two-factor authentication, active sessions, and login history
security.verifyIdentityDescription: For security, please verify your identity before making changes to your security settings.
security.enterCodeToDisable: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to disable two-factor authentication.
security.enter6DigitCodeFromApp: Please enter a 6-digit code from your authenticator

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Manage your active sessions across devices

securityAlerts.title: Security Alerts
securityAlerts.description: Important security events on your account
securityAlerts.noAlertsDescription: Security events like logins and password changes will appear here

recoveryCodes.title: Recovery Codes
recoveryCodes.description: Use these codes to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator app
recoveryCodes.codesStoredSecurely: Your recovery codes are stored securely
recoveryCodes.codesStoredDescription: Recovery codes were shown when you enabled 2FA. If you need new codes, you can regenerate them below. This will invalidate your current codes.
recoveryCodes.warningDescription: Store them in a secure location. Each code can only be used once. If you lose both your authenticator and these codes, you may lose access to your account.
recoveryCodes.regenerateHint: Lost your codes? Generate new ones (this will invalidate existing codes)
recoveryCodes.setPasswordFirst: You need to set a password before you can regenerate recovery codes. OAuth-only accounts should save their codes during 2FA setup.
recoveryCodes.confirmRegenerateWarning: This will invalidate your current codes
recoveryCodes.confirmRegenerateDescription: Any existing recovery codes will stop working immediately. Make sure to save your new codes in a secure location.
recoveryCodes.regenerateError: Failed to regenerate codes. Please try again.
recoveryCodes.regenerateSuccessDescription: Your old codes have been invalidated. Save these new codes in a secure location.
recoveryCodes.enterCodeToRegenerate: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to regenerate recovery codes.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: Manage your subscription plan and billing
subscription.currentPlanDescription: View your current subscription plan and billing information
subscription.lifetimeDescription: You have unlimited access to all premium features
subscription.lifetimeAccessDescription: Thank you for your lifetime support! Enjoy unlimited access to all premium features, forever.
subscription.upgradeDescription: Get unlimited access to all puzzles, archive games, and streak protection
subscription.manageDescription: Update your subscription, payment method, and billing details
subscription.billingPortalDescription: Opens Stripe billing portal to manage your subscription and payment methods
subscription.billingHistoryDescription: View your past invoices and payments
subscription.updatePaymentDescription: Manage your payment methods in the billing portal

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.compactModeDescription: Use a denser layout with smaller spacing

language.title: Language & Region
language.description: Set your language and regional preferences
language.timezoneDescription: Set your local timezone for daily puzzle resets

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Manage how and when you receive updates

overview.title: Notification Center
overview.description: Stay updated on your puzzles and streaks

pushMasterEnabled: Push notifications are enabled for this device
pushUnsupported: 您的瀏覽器不支援推播通知
pushDisabled: 推播通知目前無法使用
pushDailyReminderDescription: Get reminded to play your daily puzzles
pushStreakAlertDescription: Get notified when your streak is at risk
pushNewGamesDescription: Be the first to know about new games
emailMasterDescription: Receive updates and notifications via email
emailWeeklyDigestDescription: Summary of your weekly progress and stats
testPushDescription: Send a test notification to verify push is working
testPushSentDescription: Sent to {count, plural, one {# device} other {# devices}}
testEmailDescription: Send a test email to verify email notifications are working
testEmailSentDescription: Check your inbox for the test email
reduceMotionDescription: Minimize animations and transitions for accessibility
compactModeDescription: Use a denser layout with smaller spacing

privacy.title: Privacy

profileVisibility.title: Profile Visibility
profileVisibility.description: Control who can see your profile and information
profileVisibility.publicProfileDescription: Make your profile visible at puzzled.gg/u/{username}
profileVisibility.leaderboardDescription: Show your name and stats on public leaderboards

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.description: Export or manage your personal data

privacy.exportDescription: Download a copy of all your data in JSON format
privacy.exportGameHistory: Complete game history and daily games

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Help us improve Puzzled with anonymous usage data
analytics.collectionDescription: We collect anonymous analytics to improve your experience:
analytics.noPersonalData: No personal information is shared. All data is anonymized.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.dangerZoneDescription: Irreversible actions that permanently affect your account
deleteAccount.warningDescription: Deleting your account is permanent. All your data will be erased forever.
deleteAccount.typeDelete: Type "{confirmWord}" in all caps to confirm
deleteAccount.permanentActionDescription: Once deleted, your account cannot be recovered. All data will be permanently erased.
deleteAccount.verifyDescription: For your security, please verify your identity before deleting your account.

sessions.title: 活動工作階段
sessions.description: 管理所有裝置上的活動工作階段
sessions.signOutAllOtherDescription: {count, plural, =1 {將登出 1 個工作階段} other {將登出 # 個工作階段}}
sessions.revokeAllError: 登出其他工作階段失敗
sessions.sessionRevokedDescription: The session has been successfully signed out
sessions.allSessionsRevokedDescription: {count, plural, =0 {No sessions were signed out} =1 {1 session was signed out} other {# sessions were signed out}}
sessions.confirmRevokeDescription: This will sign out the device and they will need to sign in again to access your account.
sessions.confirmRevokeAllDescription: {count, plural, =1 {This will sign out 1 other device. They will need to sign in again.} other {This will sign out # other devices. They will all need to sign in again.}}
